title: Interstellar
plot: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space to save humanity from environmental collapse. Explores concepts of time dilation gravity relativity and fatherhood.

title: The Hangover
plot: Three friends wake up from a wild bachelor party in Las Vegas with no memory of the night and a missing groom. Chaotic comedy ensues.

title: The Conjuring
plot: Paranormal investigators work to help a family experiencing terrifying dark entities and haunted houses.

title: Inception
plot: A skilled thief steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology inside multi-layered dream spaces.

title: Blade Runner 2049
plot: A young blade runner discovers a long-buried secret that leads him to track down former blade runner Rick Deckard.

title: Drive
plot: A Hollywood stunt driver who moonlights as a getaway driver finds himself in trouble when he helps his neighbor.

title: La La Land
plot: A jazz pianist and an aspiring actress fall in love while navigating their creative ambitions and career struggles in Los Angeles.

title: The Dark Knight
plot: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological tests of his ability to fight injustice.

title: Pulp Fiction
plot: The lives of two mob hitmen a boxer a gangster and his wife and a pair of diner bandits intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

title: Forrest Gump
plot: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson the Vietnam War the Watergate scandal and other historical events unfold from the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75.

title: Goodfellas
plot: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob covering his relationship with his wife Karen Hill and his mob partners Jimmy Conway and Tommy DeVito.

title: The Godfather
plot: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty in postwar New York City transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant youngest son.

title: Spirited Away
plot: During her family move to the suburbs a sullen 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods witches and spirits and where humans are changed into beasts.

title: Parasite
plot: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.

title: Whiplash
plot: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored by an instructor who will stop at nothing to realize a student potential.

title: The Prestige
plot: After a tragic accident two stage magicians in 1890s London engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion while sacrificing everything they have to outwit each other.

title: The Departed
plot: An undercover cop and a mole in the police attempt to identify each other while infiltrating an Irish gang in South Boston.

title: Spider-Man Into the Spider-Verse
plot: Teen Miles Morales becomes the Spider-Man of his universe and must join with five spider-powered individuals from other dimensions to stop a threat for all realities.

title: The Lion King
plot: A young lion prince is cast out of his pride by his cruel uncle who claims he killed his father. He grows up beyond the savanna before returning to reclaim his throne.

title: Joker
plot: A gritty character study of Arthur Fleck a man disregarded by society who unravels into a cruel criminal mastermind in Gotham City.

title: Alien
plot: The crew of a commercial spacecraft encounters a deadly lifeform after investigating an unknown transmission on a distant planet.

title: The Thing
plot: A research team in Antarctica is hunted by a shape-shifting alien that assumes the appearance of its victims causing paranoia to rip through the crew.

title: Coco
plot: Aspiring musician Miguel confronted with his family ancestral ban on music enters the Land of the Dead to find his great-great-grandfather a legendary singer.

title: Get Out
plot: A young African-American visits his white girlfriend parents for the weekend where his simmering uneasiness about their reception of him reaches a boiling point.

title: Mad Max Fury Road
plot: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners and a drifter named Max.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
plot: A writer relates his adventures at a renowned European resort between the first and second World Wars with a devoted concierge framed for murder.

title: Arrival
plot: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien craftsmanship that have landed around the Earth before tensions lead to global war.

title: The Truman Show
plot: An insurance salesman discovers his whole life is actually a reality television show broadcast to the entire world and plans his ultimate escape.

title: Fight Club
plot: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into something much more dangerous.

title: Seven

title: Jurassic Park
plot: A pragmatic paleontologist visiting a secret theme park is tasked with protecting two kids after a power failure causes the park cloned dinosaurs to run loose.

title: Shutter Island
plot: In 1954 a US Marshal investigates the disappearance of a murderer who escaped from a hospital for the criminally insane on a remote wind-swept island.

title: Dunkirk
plot: Allied soldiers from Belgium the British Empire and France are surrounded by the German Army and evacuated during a fierce battle in World War II.

title: Heat
plot: A group of high-end professional thieves start to feel the heat from the LAPD when they unknowingly leave a clue at their latest heist scene.

title: Logan

title: Die Hard
plot: An NYPD officer tries to save his estranged wife and several others taken hostage by German terrorists during a Christmas party in a Los Angeles high-rise.

title: No Country for Old Men

title: The Silence of the Lambs
plot: A young FBI cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated and manipulative cannibal killer to catch another serial killer who skins his victims.

title: Prisoners

title: A Quiet Place
plot: In a post-apocalyptic world a family is forced to live in absolute silence while hiding from monsters with ultra-sensitive hearing that hunt any sound.

title: The Shining
plot: A family heads to an isolated hotel for the winter where a sinister presence influences the father into violence while his psychic son sees horrific forebodings.

title: Hereditary
plot: A grieving family is haunted by tragic and disturbing occurrences after the death of their secretive grandmother unraveling dark ancestral secrets.

title: The Exorcist
plot: When a young girl is possessed by a mysterious entity her desperate mother seeks the help of two priests to save her daughter through an exorcism.

title: Midsommar

title: Nightcrawler
plot: When Louis Bloom a con man desperate for work muscles into the world of LA freelance crime journalism he blurs the line between observer and participant.

title: The Sixth Sense
plot: A child psychologist starts treating a young boy who claims he can encounter and speak with dead spirits who walk around unnoticed.

title: Black Swan
plot: A committed dancer wins the lead role in a production of Swan Lake only to find herself struggling to maintain her sanity as a dark rival emerges.

title: Zodiac
plot: Between 1968 and 1983 a San Francisco cartoonist becomes obsessively track-minded with tracking down the Zodiac Killer a serial killer terrorizing Northern California.

title: Knives Out
plot: A detective investigates the death of a patriarchal eccentric comic writer at his isolated estate amid a family of combative suspects.

title: Gone Girl
plot: With his wife disappearance having become the focus of an intense media circus a man sees the spotlight turned on him when suspected of foul play.

title: Sicario
plot: An idealistic FBI agent is enlisted by a government task force to aid in the escalating war against drugs at the lawless border area between the US and Mexico.

title: Avatar
plot: A paraplegic Marine dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission becomes torn between following his orders and protecting the alien world he calls home.

title: The Terminator
plot: A human soldier is sent from 2029 to 1984 to protect a young woman targeted for termination by a robotic killing machine sent from the future machine network.

title: Terminator 2 Judgment Day
plot: A cyborg identical to the one who failed to kill Sarah Connor must now protect her ten-year-old son John from a more advanced liquid-metal shape-shifting killer.

title: The Martian
plot: An astronaut becomes stranded on Mars after his crew assumes him dead and must rely on his ingenuity to find a way to signal Earth that he is alive.

title: Spider-Man 2
plot: Peter Parker is beset with troubles in his failing personal life while he battles a brilliant scientist named Doctor Octopus who has mechanical tentacles.

title: Iron Man
plot: After being held captive in an Afghan cave billionaire engineer Tony Stark creates a unique weaponized suit of armor to fight evil forces.

title: The Avengers
plot: Earth mightiest heroes must come together and learn to fight as a cohesive team if they are to stop the mischievous Loki and his alien army from enslaving humanity.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy
plot: A group of intergalactic criminals must pull together to stop a fanatical warrior with plans to purge the universe using a mysterious powerful orb.

title: Star Wars A New Hope
plot: Luke Skywalker joins forces with a Jedi Master a cocky pilot a Wookiee and two droids to save the galaxy from the Empire world-destroying battle station.

title: Star Wars The Empire Strikes Back
plot: After the Rebels are brutally overpowered by the Empire on the ice planet Hoth Luke Skywalker begins Jedi training with Yoda while his friends are pursued by Darth Vader.

title: Ex Machina
plot: A programmer at a huge internet-search giant wins a competition to spend a week at the private mountain estate of the company brilliant CEO to evaluate a humanlike AI.

title: Minority Report
plot: In a future world where the police utilize psychic technology to arrest murderers before they commit their crimes a top officer is accused of a future murder.

title: District 9
plot: An unmanaged alien refugee population forced to live in slum-like conditions on Earth finds an unexpected champion in a government agent exposed to their biotechnology.

title: Looper
plot: In 2074 when the mob wants to get rid of someone the target is sent 30 years into the past where a hired gun called a looper handles the execution assignment.

title: Her
plot: In a near future a lonely writer develops an unlikely passionate relationship with an advanced operating system designed to meet his every human need.

title: Superbad
plot: Two co-dependent high school seniors are forced to deal with separation anxiety after their plan to stage a liquor-filled party goes wildly wrong.

title: The Nice Guys
plot: In 1970s Los Angeles a mismatched pair of private eyes investigate the mysterious disappearance of a young girl and the death of a prominent adult film star.

title: Zombieland
plot: A shy student trying to reach his family in Ohio a gun-toting tough guy trying to find the last Twinkie and a pair of sisters join forces to travel across a zombie-filled America.

title: Shaun of the Dead
plot: A dull London electronics salesman and his lazy roommate must protect their friends and family from a sudden unexpected zombie apocalypse spreading over town.

title: Hot Fuzz
plot: An overachieving London police officer is transferred to a quiet village where he struggles to adapt until a series of gruesome accidental deaths raise his suspicions.

title: The Big Lebowski
plot: The Dude Lebowski a laid-back LA slacker mistaken for a millionaire with the same name is dragged into a chaotic web of kidnapping debt and bowling rivalries.

title: Mean Girls
plot: Cady Heron is a hit with The Plastics the A-list girl clique at her new high school until she makes the mistake of falling for Aaron Samuels the ex-boyfriend of alpha Regina George.

title: Anchorman
plot: Ron Burgundy is San Diego top-rated news anchorman in the male-dominated 1970s broadcast world until an ambitious new female anchor challenges his status.

title: Step Brothers
plot: Two spoiled middle-aged men still living at home are forced to become roommates when their single parents marry causing complete household chaos.

title: Tropic Thunder
plot: Through a series of strange freak occurrences a group of self-absorbed actors shooting a big-budget war movie are forced to become real soldiers in the jungle.

title: Borat
plot: A famous television journalist from Kazakhstan travels to the United States to make a documentary capturing real interactions with American citizens.

title: The Notebook
plot: An epic love story told from a notebook following a young man and woman from different social classes who fall in love during a golden summer.

title: About Time
plot: At the age of 21 Tim discovers he can travel through time and alter what happens in his own life so he decides to use his gift to win the heart of a woman.

title: Pride and Prejudice
plot: Sparks fly when spirited Elizabeth Bennet meets the wealthy and proud Mr Darcy but he must overcome his pride and she her prejudice before they can unite.

title: Before Sunrise
plot: A young American man and a French woman meet on a train across Europe and wind up spending one magical evening walking the streets of Vienna together.

title: 500 Days of Summer
plot: An offbeat romantic comedy about a woman who does not believe true love exists and the young greeting card writer who falls hopelessly in love with her.

title: Crazy Rich Asians
plot: An Asian-American professor travels to Singapore to meet her boyfriend family and discovers they are one of the wealthiest dynasties in the country.

title: The Fault in Our Stars
plot: Two witty teenage cancer patients meet at a support group and embark on a life-affirming journey to Amsterdam to meet a reclusive author.

title: A Star Is Born
plot: A seasoned musician helps a struggling young singer find fame even as age and his own personal demons send his own career into a downward spiral.

title: Titanic
plot: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious ill-fated R M S Titanic during its maiden voyage.

title: Casablanca
plot: In World War II Morocco a cynical American nightclub owner is torn between helping his former lover and her rebel husband escape the Nazi forces.

title: Toy Story
plot: A cowboy doll is profoundly threatened and jealous when a fancy new spaceman figure becomes the top toy in a young boy bedroom collection.

title: Up
plot: 78-year-old Carl Fredricksen travels to Paradise Falls in his house equipped with thousands of balloons inadvertently taking a young stowaway explorer along.

title: WALL-E
plot: In the distant future a small waste-collecting robot inadvertently embarks on a space journey that will ultimately decide the fate of all mankind.

title: Ratatouille
plot: A talented rat who can cook forms an alliance with a clumsy young kitchen garbage boy at a famous Parisian restaurant to achieve his culinary dreams.

title: The Incredibles
plot: A family of undercover superheroes are forced into action to save the world from an eccentric weapon designer seeking total destruction.

title: Monsters Inc
plot: In order to power their city monsters have to scare human children but operations are thrown into chaos when a fearless little girl accidentally enters their world.

title: Shrek
plot: An unsocial ogre finds his peaceful swamp overrun by fairy tale creatures and sets out on a journey with a talking donkey to rescue a princess.

title: How to Train Your Dragon
plot: A hapless young Viking teenager aspires to hunt dragons but unexpectedly becomes the unlikely friend of a young rare dragon learning there is more to them.

title: Zootopia
plot: In a city of anthropomorphic animals a rookie bunny cop and a cynical con artist fox must work together to uncover a massive missing mammal conspiracy.

title: Spider-Man Across the Spider-Verse
plot: Miles Morales catapults across the Multiverse where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence before clashing over a threat.

title: The Social Network
plot: Harvard student Mark Zuckerberg creates the social networking site that would become Facebook facing legal battles from co-founders and early investors.

title: The Wolf of Wall Street
plot: Based on the true story of Jordan Belfort from his rise to a wealthy stockbroker living the high life to his ultimate fall involving crime and corruption.

title: Schindler List

title: Saving Private Ryan
plot: Following the Normandy Landings a group of US soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper whose brothers have all been killed in action.
Two young British soldiers during the First World War are given an impossible mission to deliver a message deep in enemy territory to stop a deadly ambush.

title: Glory
plot: The inspiring true story of the Union Army first all-black volunteer infantry regiment in the American Civil War and their heroic battles.

title: The Pianist
plot: A Polish Jewish musician struggles to survive the destruction of the Warsaw ghetto during the brutal German occupation of World War II.

title: Platoon
plot: A young soldier in the Vietnam War faces a moral crisis caught between two conflicting sergeants amid the horrors of frontline combat.

title: Full Metal Jacket
plot: A pragmatic US Marine observes the dehumanizing effects the Vietnam War has on his fellow recruits from brutal boot camp training to urban street combat.

title: Black Hawk Down
plot: The heroic story of a group of elite US soldiers dropped into a hostile market square in Somalia who find themselves trapped in a fierce urban firefight.
